name: @dharma/terminal
description: Bun + Ink terminal frontend for Dharma Swarm

scripts.test:repo-pane: bun test tests/protocol.test.ts tests/persistence.test.ts tests/repoPane.test.ts tests/sidebar.test.ts tests/app.test.ts
scripts.verify:command-routing: bun run typecheck && bun run test:command-routing
scripts.verify:control-surface: bun run typecheck && bun run test:control-surface
scripts.verify:repo-pane: bun run typecheck && bun run test:repo-pane
